title: Number of Subarrays with Bounded Maximum

testcases.input: nums = [2,1,4,3], left = 2, right = 3 Output: 3 Explanation: There are three subarrays that meet the requirements: [2], [2, 1], [3].
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: There are three subarrays that meet the requirements: [2], [2, 1], [3].
